summary: Iteration 150: Contraction Timer Phase 2 backend APIs fully working (24/24 tests passed). Frontend Phase 2 UI elements NOT visible - headerRow with settings gear and secondaryActionsRow (Water Broke, Notes, Charts buttons) not rendering in browser.

ui_bugs.issue: Header row with settings gear icon not rendering/visible at top of timer screen. The statsStrip appears at the very top instead of below the headerRow.
Secondary actions row with 'Water Broke', 'Notes', and 'Charts' buttons not visible. Should appear below bottomActions but before bottom navigation.

issues: Phase 2 header row (title + settings icon) not visible
Phase 2 secondary actions (Water Broke, Notes, Charts) not visible
Only Phase 1 elements visible: stats strip, timer circle, Start Contraction button, bottom actions

backend_api_tests.details: All Phase 2 backend APIs working: GET/PUT /preferences, POST/DELETE /water-broke, PUT /notes, PUT /mark-primary, GET /chart-data

water_breaking.details: Record and clear water breaking working, team notification sent

session_notes.details: Session notes update and clear working

primary_session.details: Mark/unmark as primary labor session working

chart_data.details: Chart data endpoint returns duration_data, interval_data, intensity_data arrays

frontend_ui.details: Phase 1 UI visible (timer, stats, bottom actions). Phase 2 UI elements (headerRow with settings, secondaryActionsRow) NOT visible.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix headerRow visibility - settings gear icon for birth word and alert threshold preferences not accessible
CRITICAL: Fix secondaryActionsRow visibility - Water Broke, Notes, and Charts buttons not accessible
Investigate if layout/styling issue is causing these Phase 2 elements to be hidden or not render
Consider checking if SafeAreaView or flex layout is causing content clipping
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed duplicate pulseAnim variable declaration (lines 177 and 184) - was causing React error
Backend code is clean with proper route ordering (/preferences BEFORE /{contraction_id} wildcard)
Frontend code structure looks correct but Phase 2 elements not rendering in browser

success_rate.frontend: 60% (Phase 1 UI working, Phase 2 UI elements NOT visible)

seed_data_creation: Used existing demo accounts, created test session for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 backend APIs all working correctly. Frontend issue: The headerRow (with settings gear) and secondaryActionsRow (Water Broke, Notes, Charts buttons) are in the code but NOT rendering visibly in the browser. Main agent needs to fix the layout/rendering issue for these components. Phase 1 timer functionality works fine.
rca_of_the_issue: Phase 2 UI elements (headerRow at line 715-720 and secondaryActionsRow at line 827-846) exist in code but are not visible in browser. Possible causes: (1) Layout issue with SafeAreaView, (2) Elements being clipped by viewport/navigation, (3) z-index or positioning issue causing elements to be behind other components. The statsStrip appears at the very top of the screen where headerRow should be above it.
